data.body: Plan-review PASS+signed (--ref HEAD, round 3). Advisory triage: E4 (test_session_shims.py docstring mentions S6) — anticipatory from S4; S6's tests live in the NEW test_harness_shims.py, S6 does not modify test_session_shims.py. G6/T3 (profile append only reaches interactive/login shells) — valid best-effort caveat now documented; the Secrets tab is the reliable path (already the documented first-class mechanism). Design correction vs the epic sketch: Codex hooks CANNOT export env and Cursor environment.json has no env field, so both shims reliably set only the AI_AGENT harness TAG (cited vendor docs); dynamic per-session-id capture is a documented limitation.
